(a) Except as provided by Subsection (b), a person may not remove, damage, destroy, misplace, or extinguish a warning device required under Sections 547.502-547.507 when the device is being displayed or used as required.

(b) This section does not apply to:

(1) an owner of a vehicle or the owner’s authorized agent or employee; or

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 547. Vehicle Equip.
##### § 547.508 — Offense Relating to Warning Devices

(a) Except as provided by Subsection (b), a person may not remove, damage, destroy, misplace, or extinguish a warning device required under Sections 547.502-547.507 when the device is being displayed or used as required.

(b) This section does not apply to:

    (1) an owner of a vehicle or the owner’s authorized agent or employee; or

    (2) a peace officer acting in an official capacity.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Except as provided by Subsection (b), a person may not remove, damage, destroy, misplace, or extinguish a warning device required under Sections 547.502-547.507 when the device is being displayed or used as required.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: This section does not apply to:
an owner of a vehicle or the owner’s authorized agent or employee; or
a peace officer acting in an official capacity.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
